summary: Call Scheduling Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 100% working after z-index fix. Successfully created a scheduled call via UI.

fixed_issues.issue: Calendar date picker popover clicks were intercepted by Dialog overlay due to z-index conflict
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Changed PopoverContent z-index from z-50 to z-[150] in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/popover.jsx

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/calls/schedule requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/calls/scheduled requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/calls/scheduled/upcoming requires auth (401)
Backend: POST /api/calls/scheduled/check-reminders requires auth (401)
Backend: POST /api/calls/schedule with invalid lead_id returns 404
Backend: POST /api/calls/schedule with past date returns 400 (validation working)
Backend: POST /api/calls/schedule with invalid date format returns 400
Backend: POST /api/calls/schedule with valid data creates scheduled call
Backend: GET /api/calls/scheduled returns list of scheduled calls
Backend: GET /api/calls/scheduled?status=scheduled filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/calls/scheduled/upcoming returns upcoming calls (next 7 days)
Backend: PUT /api/calls/scheduled/{id} updates scheduled call
Backend: PUT /api/calls/scheduled/{id} can update status to completed
Backend: PUT /api/calls/scheduled/{id} with invalid ID returns 404
Backend: POST /api/calls/scheduled/check-reminders checks and creates notifications
Backend: DELETE /api/calls/scheduled/{id} cancels the call
Backend: DELETE /api/calls/scheduled/{id} already cancelled returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/calls/scheduled/{id} with invalid ID returns 404
Backend: Data persistence - created call appears in list
Backend: Data persistence - all fields (notes, reminder_minutes) persist correctly
Frontend: /calls page header has 'Schedule Call' button
Frontend: /calls page header has 'Call Now' button
Frontend: 'Upcoming Calls' banner shows scheduled calls with badge count
Frontend: Upcoming call cards display Today/Tomorrow/date labels
Frontend: Stats row includes 5th card 'Scheduled' with correct count (3)
Frontend: 'Call History' tab with badge count visible
Frontend: 'Scheduled' tab with badge count visible
Frontend: Scheduled tab shows list of scheduled calls
Frontend: Scheduled calls display Today/date labels
Frontend: Scheduled calls have Edit and Delete buttons
Frontend: Schedule Call dialog opens with all required fields
Frontend: Schedule Call dialog has lead selector
Frontend: Schedule Call dialog has date picker (calendar component)
Frontend: Schedule Call dialog has time selector
Frontend: Schedule Call dialog has reminder selector
Frontend: Schedule Call dialog has notes textarea
Frontend: Call Now dialog opens correctly
Frontend: Call Now dialog has lead selector
Frontend: Call Now dialog has opening message input
Frontend: Search bar present and functional
critical_code_review_comments: CallsPage.jsx: Missing DialogDescription for accessibility (Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent') - minor issue, can be addressed later
seed_data_creation: Test scheduled calls created via API testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Call scheduling feature fully tested and working. Z-index issue was found and FIXED (popover.jsx z-50 -> z-[150]). All backend APIs pass (19/19 tests). Frontend successfully creates scheduled calls via UI - tested end-to-end. 4 existing scheduled calls in database. Twilio is NOT configured but scheduling feature works independently.

features: returns all fields including lead_name, lead_company, notes

DELETE /api/calls/scheduled/{id}.behavior: Sets status to cancelled, second delete returns 404

frontend_schedule_dialog.e2e_test: Successfully created scheduled call via UI

twilio.note: Twilio integration not configured but scheduling feature works independently
